dict.string: yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Documents.
yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Downloads.
yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Desktop.
yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Music.
yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Movies.
yadm studio reads and writes tracked dotfiles anywhere in your home directory, including Pictures.
yadm studio manages dotfiles across your entire home directory. This is the entire point of the application.
